creator: schaiba@gmail.com
text: In here - https://svn0.us-west.freebsd.org/base/releng/11.0/README - at the bottom you will see this link - https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/synching.html for sync'ing your source code. The link is invalid, so the README should probably point to https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/updating-src.html instead.
